articles.headline: Canada make history with first World Cup win, but they're just getting started
articles.description: Canada's first-ever men's World Cup win was a historic moment for the sport in the country. Just don't think they're finished yet.

images.credit: (Photo by Ercin Erturk/Anadolu via Getty Images)

articles.headline: Mexico beats South Korea to clinch first place in Group A
articles.description: Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 on Thursday and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Thomas Tuchel throws ceremonial first pitch at Kansas City Royals game
articles.description: Just over 24 hours after watching his side open their campaign with a 4-2 victory over Croatia, Tuchel went to Kauffman Stadium to perform the ceremonial act.
